caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT OUT," and large silver headphones speaks into a professional condenser microphone. He is positioned in a studio setting with a white background featuring a vertical banner that reads "HUSTLE" and displays several gold stars. To his right, a dark wall features the words "BOSS TALK 101" in red and white lettering. A digital overlay at the bottom of the screen includes a logo for "PODCAST" on the left and the text "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. Across the sequence, the man is captured mid-conversation, gesturing with his right hand in the first frame and then relaxing his posture. His head shifts slightly as he speaks, moving from a profile view to a slightly more frontal angle while maintaining his position behind the microphone.
